headlines.headline: Talvyn Goods announces $2.5B share buyback program

sentiment.reasoning: A large share buyback program typically signals management confidence and can boost shareholder value by reducing share count and increasing EPS.

headlines.headline: Jorval Trading Co withdraws from Scandinavia market citing unfavorable conditions

sentiment.reasoning: Withdrawing from a market due to unfavorable conditions suggests underperformance or strategic realignment, potentially leading to one-time costs but also stopping future losses.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
